summary: CRITICAL FAILURE: Task explicitly requires bats-core testing framework and TDD methodology ("write failing test FIRST"), but delivery has ZERO bats tests — only manual test cases embedded in workflow. Bash script itself follows good practices (set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, error handling), and workflow YAML is sound (minimal permissions, proper triggers, checkout@v4). However, the jq logic for cartesian product (lines 49–59) and exclude matching (lines 61–76) is dense and poorly commented; maintainer would struggle to modify safely without proper unit tests. No act-result.txt artifact shown. No test fixtures provided. Fundamentally fails core requirement.
